title: Disable popups for Monday.com events, seminars, etc
excerpt:
Haven’t seen any posts like this, as it’s a (current) site promotion that’s the issue.

posts.author: Bdashdash (B)
posts.cookedHtml:
Haven’t seen any posts like this, as it’s a (current) site promotion that’s the issue.
I like Monday.com for its productivity flow, but there have been recurring popup ads for Monday.com events/promotions, adding a distraction to what is supposed to be productivity software.

Even landing on THIS page to request the removal of these pop up ads:

this1158×690 71.4 KB

Could I PLEASE disable these distracting popups?
I’m not planning on attending any Monday.com events, ever. I’m just trying to get my job done without daily distractions for events I have no interest in (and are usually located on another continent.) Again- largely, Monday is super useful, but it’s productivity software- I don’t need distractions!

posts.author: XZR (XZR)
posts.cookedHtml: Same, my workplace pays a lot for this platform and there should definitely be an option to disable all of these distractions.
